title: pthread_mutex_t should be properly initialized and destroyed
description: Mutexes are synchronization primitives that allow managing concurrency. Their use requires following a well-defined life cycle: Mutexes need to be initialized (using pthread_mutex_init) before being used. Once it is initialized, a mutex is in an unlocked state.
recommendation: Refactor to eliminate the flagged pattern.

checks.message: Mutex lifecycle violation - improper initialization or missing destruction
